title: Blue Lock Hypes Live-Action Movie With New Trailer (& Cast Reveals)
content: Blue Lock is setting the stage for its live-action movie debut coming later this Summer, and fans have gotten a cool new look at what to expect from some new additions to the cast with a new trailer. Muneyuki Kaneshiro and Yusuke Nomura’s Blue Lock manga has really exploded in popularity in the last few years .
author: ComicBook

title: After 7 Years, Legendary Shonen Jump Creator Returns With New Series (& It’s Wild)
content: Seven years after the end of Gintama , series creator Hideaki Sorachi has returned to the pages of Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine with a wild new series. It’s been a pretty big year for Sorachi as with Gintama celebrating the 20th anniversary of both its anime and manga release, Sorachi’s projects have been…
author: ComicBook

title: Spring 2026’s Hottest Shonen Jump Anime Confirms Netflix Release Date (& English Dub Schedule)
content: Shonen Jump has a major new anime debut taking over the Spring 2026 anime schedule, and now it’s confirmed it’s release date with Netflix ahead of its official English dub debut.
author: ComicBook

title: 7 Great Standalone Animated Movies That Deserved a Sequel
content: Animation has been a major part of the entertainment world for as long as fans can remember, but despite the genre’s popularity, not every animated film is guaranteed a sequel. Some animated movies ended their stories on a cliffhanger, while others have created tales that feel as though they have been “one and done.”…
author: ComicBook

title: Mission: Yozakura Family Anime Season 2 Casts Yume Miyamoto
content: The staff for the anime of Hitsuji Gondaira 's Mission: Yozakura Family ( Yozakura-san Chi no Daisakusen ) manga announced on Sunday that Yume Miyamoto is joining the second season's cast as Jigokumimi no Usa, a reporter for the underground gossip magazine Spyday .
author: ANN

title: Chainsaw Man, Jujutsu Kaisen, More Manga Rank on NYT April Bestseller List
content: The manga on this month's list include: • #2 — Tatsuki Fujimoto's Chainsaw Man volume 20 • #4 — Gege Akutami's Jujutsu Kaisen volume 29 • #5 — Eiichiro Oda's One Piece volume 111 • #6 — Akira Toriyama and Toyotarō's Dragon Ball Super volume 24 • #8 — Kei Urana's Gachiakuta volume 1 • #9 — Gege Akutami's Jujutsu Kaisen…
author: ANN

title: Rascal Does Not Dream Reveals Mai Sakurajima Memorial Visual
content: Rascal Does Not Dream anime revealed a new memorial visual, this time featuring the popular Mai Sakurajima. The anime will reach its conclusion with the release of the upcoming Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend movie, which is set to premiere in Japan on October 16. Rio Futaba received her own visual last month.
author: Anime Corner

title: Japan’s No. 1 Spring 2026 Anime Is the True Successor to an All-Time Great
content: We are barely entering the third week of Spring 2026, and Japan has already made it clear that the No. 1 anime this season is the successor to one of the greatest anime ever made. The series in question is the shonen classic Fullmetal Alchemist , adapted from the manga of the same name by Hiromu Arakawa.
author: ComicBook

title: Shonen Jump’s New Sports Series Is the Ultimate Replacement for Haikyuu and Blue Box
content: Shonen Jump continues to release new manga this year as well, despite canceling or concluding many of its current ongoing series . In its latest release, Shonen Jump’s newest title might just be the perfect replacement for the acclaimed sports manga Haikyuu!! and Blue Box. Haikyuu!!
author: ComicBook

title: Japanese Animation TV Ranking, April 6-12
content: The Detective Conan: One-eyed Flashback film aired on NTV on Friday, April 10 at 9:00 p.m. and it earned an 8.5% rating. The television ratings above are an estimate of the percentage of the population that watch a given program, based on data from a survey of households in Japan's Kanto region.
author: ANN
